title: Darth Bandon's fiber armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:DarthBandon3.jpg|thumb|Darth Bandon wearing his personalized fiber armor|right|200px]]
'''Darth Bandon's fiber armor''' was a unique suit of armor that was crafted and prized by [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]], [[Darth Bandon]]; the silvery polish reflected a pride in craftsmanship that was rarely seen during the [[Jedi Civil War]].
{{Gamemechanics}}
Following the death of Bandon in a [[Mission to Hrakert Station|duel]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], his light armor might have ended up in the hands of the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
It may not be on Manaan that the duel between Darth Bandon and Revan takes place. It depends solely on the order of planets chosen by the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
